reasoning: While the composite fidelity score (0.8978) and programmatic recall (0.932) are strong, the specific evidence of content loss is concerning. The omission of 60% of bullet points on a slide and all contact email addresses represents a functional failure in the document's utility, even if classified as minor by the underlying signals. Given the 3x cost penalty for false negatives, the document requires manual intervention to restore missing text and contact links.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: I identified two major omissions. First, in the 'Survey Background' section (Page 2), five out of the eight original bullet points are missing, representing a loss of over 60% of the text content for that slide. Second, in the 'Contacts' section (Page 16), all email addresses are missing, leaving only the role headings.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 2 bullet points: '• LGC and SGUC drafted 10 survey questions', '• Type of census-related data used', '• Scale of use', '• Decisions based on census-related data', '• Funding based on census-related data'. Page 16 email addresses: 'DABrannan@cabarruscounty.us', 'anna.verrill@nc.gov', 'tim.johnson@nc.gov'.
concerns.output_quote: The list in 'Survey Background' (reading_order 7) contains only 3 items. The 'Contacts' section (reading_order 16) contains only headings.

concerns.analysis: In Section 2 (Page 2), the list structure is severely compromised. The source PDF contains a multi-level list with 4 main bullets and 4 sub-bullets. The JSON output only captures 3 of the main bullets, completely omitting the second main bullet ('LGC and SGUC drafted 10 survey questions') and all of its associated sub-bullets. This represents a significant failure to represent the source's list organization.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Slide 2 contains a list item 'LGC and SGUC drafted 10 survey questions' with 4 sub-bullets: 'Type of census-related data used', 'Scale of use', 'Decisions based on census-related data', and 'Funding based on census-related data'.
concerns.output_quote: The list in Section 2 only contains 3 items: 'Following last GICC Meeting,', 'Survey sent to various listservs...', and 'Total of 52 response collected.'

concerns.analysis: Page 16 of the source document contains three functional email links/addresses. These are not present in the JSON as text or clickable links; they appear to have been interpreted as images or omitted entirely from the text elements of Section 16.
concerns.output_quote: The email text and links are missing from the headings and paragraphs in the section.

action_items: Restore the five missing bullet points in the 'Survey Background' section
Repair the list hierarchy on Page 2 to include the 'LGC and SGUC drafted 10 survey questions' section
Manually insert the missing contact email addresses for the three roles on Page 16
